originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Porting Environments to Static Linking and Merging BF16 PR for Faster Training
summary: Worked on porting environments to static linking, fixed failing tests, and merged a BF16 pull request from Jonah that boosted training speed to 13 million steps per second and doubled performance for larger networks. Also discussed cleaning up LLM-generated code and planning for Puffer 5.
